# opnsense_acme_challenge (Resource)
Manages an ACME challenge/validation configuration on OPNsense. Requires `os-acme-client`.
## Example Usage
```terraform
resource "opnsense_acme_challenge" "http" {
  name   = "http-challenge"
  method = "http01"
}
```
<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Challenge configuration name.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description.
- `dns_service` (String) DNS provider for DNS-01 challenges (e.g., `dns_cf` for Cloudflare, `dns_aws` for Route53).
- `dns_sleep` (Number) Seconds to wait for DNS propagation (0-84600).
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this challenge is enabled.
- `method` (String) Challenge method: `http01`, `dns01`, or `tlsalpn01`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID.
## Import
```shell
terraform import opnsense_acme_challenge.example 12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012
```
